title: Maa Beti
desc: Savitri, a wealthy woman who dies during childbirth. Her husband remarries Laxmi, who, influenced by her brother Raghunandan, mistreats Savitri’s children, Meenu and Khetan. The children run away, and years later, Laxmi's daughter, Chanda, discovers the truth about her half-siblings and their tragic past

title: The Burning Train
desc: An engineer's dream of making the perfect train for Indian Railways is given hope when the company commissions his prototype. After years dedicating himself to his dream, his family has suffered, but now he hopes to make it all up to them with the train's triumphant inaugural journey. However, an embittered fellow employee has other ideas.

title: Dastaan
desc: Vishnu, a reputed judge, is assumed to be Anil, an absconding murderer. However, he decides to travel to Anil's home town and unravel the mystery behind his lookalike's existence.

title: Heeralal Pannalal
desc: Two clumsy officers Heera Lal and Panna Lal have their lives turned into utter turmoil and hilarious chaos when they find out that another pair of men bearing their exact names have moved into town.
